submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-14-jobset-embedded-only
on: workflow_dispatch
jobs:
  caller-job:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/reusable-callee.yml
    with:
      val: "embedded-only"
      concurrency_group: "embedded-only-group"

reusable_workflows..github/workflows/reusable-callee.yml:
name: reusable-callee
on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      val:
        required: true
        type: string
      concurrency_group:
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ""
concurrency:
  group: ${{ inputs.concurrency_group }}
jobs:
  inner:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: run-inner
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=reusable-callee input=${{ inputs.val }}"
          sleep 4
          echo "DONE=reusable"
